reasoning: All plans provide L2 error metrics, and an analytic solution is available, so we prioritize smaller L2 error. Both 'plan_spectral_explicit_highres' and 'plan_spectral_explicit_mediumres' achieve extremely low L2 errors (on the order of 1e-14), with 'plan_spectral_explicit_mediumres' being slightly more accurate (4.28e-14 vs 5.41e-14) and significantly faster (25s vs 32s). The other plans have much higher errors or, in the case of the FD high-res plan, several orders of magnitude larger error for similar or higher runtime. Therefore, 'plan_spectral_explicit_mediumres' offers the best balance of accuracy and efficiency.
